55dca3cb-7eca-4e63-9c51-184be5a9617f.name: Ava
55dca3cb-7eca-4e63-9c51-184be5a9617f.content:
Strategic Direction — wc-tools Platform

PRD written 2026-03-04. See PRD file at .automaker/projects/wc-tools-platform/prd.md

Vision

Transform wc-tools from an MCP server into THE web component developer platform. Core analysis engine + extensions (CLI, GitHub Action, VS Code, wrapper generator, docs, Storybook, dashboard).

Priority

Phase 1: Programmatic API export (unlock everything). Phase 2: CLI subcommands (10x addressable market). Phase 3: GitHub Action (enterprise viral loop). Phase 4+: VS Code, wrapper gen, docs, Storybook, dashboard.

Architecture

Monorepo with packages/. Core stays as wc-tools npm package. Extensions are separate packages sharing types. pnpm workspaces.

Decisions — 2026-03-04

  • Brand name: helixkit (npm, VS Code extension "HelixKit", brew install helixkit)
  • GitHub org: bookedsolidtech
  • Version strategy: stay pre-release, next minor is 0.2.0
  • No JetBrains plugin (dropped from scope)
  • Rename later: repo + directory rename from wc-tools to helixkit deferred. All new work assumes helixkit branding.
